common.availableStores: Available on the Mac App Store and the Microsoft Store

seo.defaultDescription: Lexbell is the desktop app for managing legal case records: cases, deadlines, contacts and finances, all stored locally on your device. For Mac and Windows.

home.heroSubtitle: Cases, deadlines, contacts and finances in one desktop app. All on your device, no external cloud.
home.audienceTitle: Every case, with its own fields.
home.audienceBody: Judicial, administrative, immigration, business, rental and real estate. Each type brings the fields you actually need.
home.tabJudicialSub: Court, opposing party, opposing counsel, hearings and next actions.
home.tabAdministrativoSub: Filings before agencies, responsible officer and reply deadlines.
home.tabMigracionSub: DS-160, DS-260, A-Number, NVC Case and VAC and consular appointments.
home.tabEmpresaSub: Formation in DR (SRL, SA, EIRL, SAS) and USA (LLC, C-Corp, S-Corp).
home.tabAlquilerSub: Contracts under DR Law 85-25 with deposit and annual raise alerts.
home.tabCompraventaSub: From negotiation to Title Registry recording, with liens verification.
home.section1Title: All your work, in one place.
home.section1Body: Every case with the right legal fields for its type. No generic forms.
home.mapBody: An interactive graph shows how cases, clients and opposing parties connect. Spot relationships at a glance.
home.section2Body: Directory with ID number, phone, email and notes. Duplicate detection and filters by status.
home.section3Body: Fees, advances and expenses per case in DOP, USD or EUR, with clear KPIs.
home.section4Body: Your data never leaves your device. No servers of ours, no trackers, no telemetry.

features.title: Everything your practice needs.
features.subtitle: From the case record to finances, with privacy as the foundation. On Mac and Windows.
features.sp1Body: Every case carries the right fields for its nature. No generic forms, no time wasted.
features.sp2Body: Built-in calendar with optional sync to the system calendar and the next Dominican Republic holiday always in view.
features.sp3Title: Fees in DOP, USD or EUR.
features.sp3Body: Each case carries its currency. KPIs for collected, expenses, receivable and net profit, per case and aggregated.
features.sp5Body: An interactive graph reveals the relationships between cases, clients and opposing parties. Spot connections and potential conflicts of interest at a glance.
features.sp4Title: Your data lives on your device. Period.
features.sp4Body: No servers of ours. No Google Analytics, Mixpanel, Sentry or Firebase. Zero external connections: Lexbell needs no internet.
features.moreTitle: Small things that change your flow.
features.tile1Body: Cases, contacts and notes via one shortcut (⌘/Ctrl + E). Tolerates typos.
features.tile2Body: New, contact, task, hearing… all from the keyboard. ⌘ on Mac, Ctrl on Windows.
features.tile3Body: Same phone or ID number even if the name differs. 90% similarity match.
features.tile4Body: Export your whole database to JSON in the folder you choose: daily, weekly or monthly.
features.tile5Body: Rich-text editor on every case. Link local folders or Google Drive folders.
features.tile6Body: Looks and feels native on Mac and Windows. Light and dark mode. Spanish and English.

support.title: We're here to help.
support.subtitle: Check the quick options. If you can't find your answer, write to us — we read every message.
support.selfBody: Most common questions are answered there, along with the Privacy Policy.
support.emailBody: To report an issue, suggest an improvement or ask for help. We reply during Dominican Republic business hours.
support.compatItem1: macOS 11 Big Sur or later (Apple Silicon or Intel)

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: For anything about Lexbell, support, partnerships or privacy, write to us directly. We don't use forms — we prefer a human channel.
contact.responseBody: We reply during Dominican Republic business hours (UTC-4), Monday to Friday. Most emails are answered in less than 24 hours.
contact.developerBody: ICLVS Legal Intelligence LLC. Application designed and maintained by Eduardo Espinal, attorney and developer, for modern legal practice in the Dominican Republic and the United States.

faq.title: What we get asked the most.
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about Lexbell, its privacy model and how it works on Mac and Windows.
faq.q1: Are my cases uploaded to the cloud?
faq.a1: No. All your information lives on your own device and never leaves it. Lexbell has no servers of ours and makes no internet connection.
faq.a2: Yes, fully. Lexbell needs no internet for any of its features.
faq.q3: What do I need to use Lexbell?
faq.a3: macOS 11 Big Sur or later (Apple Silicon or Intel Macs) or 64-bit Windows 10 and 11. Around 150 MB of space.
faq.q4: Does it work the same on Mac and Windows?
faq.a4: Yes. It's the same app with the same features on both systems; only the shortcuts change: ⌘ on Mac and Ctrl on Windows.
faq.q5: How do I back up my data?
faq.a5: With automatic daily, weekly or monthly backups to the folder you choose. You can also export and import your entire database in JSON format anytime.
faq.q6: What if I stop using the app?
faq.a6: Your data is always yours: you can export it to JSON at any time. If you uninstall the app, the local data is removed with it, so it's best to export first.
faq.q7: Does it work outside the Dominican Republic?
faq.a7: It's optimized for legal practice in the Dominican Republic, with specific support for the United States in immigration (DS-160, DS-260, A-Number, NVC Case) and company formation (LLC, C-Corp, S-Corp).
faq.a8: It's a paid app. On Mac you get it from the Mac App Store and on Windows from the Microsoft Store; both stores handle billing in your local currency. We don't process payment data on our servers.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: ICLVS Legal Intelligence LLC ("we") builds Lexbell (the "App"), a desktop application for Mac and Windows. This Privacy Policy explains what information we handle, how we handle it, and your rights.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These Terms and Conditions (the "Terms") govern the use of Lexbell (the "App"), a desktop application for Mac and Windows provided by ICLVS Legal Intelligence LLC ("we"). By downloading, installing or using the App, you accept these Terms.
